programs.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programs.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programs.title: Alaska-Man vs. Wild
programs.desc: Bears face extreme temperatures and avoid black bears in the Chugach Mountains of Alaska. S04 E05.

programs.title: Castaway-Man vs. Wild
programs.desc: Bear chops his way into petrified swamps devastated by the 2004 tsunami. S02 E11.

programs.title: Tanzania-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programs.desc: Ed meets the Hadzabe of Tanzania, who collect honey from aggressive bees. S01 E03.

programs.title: Pick Your Poison-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: Two survivalists attempt to survive in Brazil for 21 days with no food, water or clothes. S09 E10.

programs.title: Everglades Thirst Trap-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: Two survivalists fight to endure 21 days of extreme dehydration in the Everglades. S19 E06.
